group.noStageAssigned: This pool doesn't have a stage assigned yet.

rules.title: Game rules
rules.goalText: Predict the exact final score of each match.
rules.step1: Join a pool group using its access code.
rules.step2: Before each match kicks off, submit your prediction: home team score and away team score.
rules.step3: Edit your prediction anytime until kickoff — once the match starts, it locks and can no longer be changed.
rules.step4: Only one prediction is allowed per user, per match, per group — resubmitting before kickoff updates your previous one.
rules.notAdditiveNote: Exact score and correct outcome aren't additive: an exact score only earns those points.
rules.standingsNote: Standings are ranked by total points, either per matchday or across the whole tournament.

toast.shareBody: Share it so others can join your pool.

toast.copyLinkFailedBody: Please copy the invite link manually.
